prompt: A bold Korean beverage advertisement poster in a glossy commercial photography style, featuring {argument name="spokesperson" default="Donald Trump lookalike"} in a dark navy business suit, white dress shirt, and vivid blue tie, standing front-facing against a saturated bright-blue sky with a few soft white clouds and a faint modern city skyline including a tall skyscraper resembling the Empire State Building on the right. He is holding a cold plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"} dramatically toward the camera in his left hand, with extreme foreshortening so the bottle appears large in the foreground and the person is slightly behind it. The bottle is clear with condensation, a white cap, visible water inside, and a deep blue label reading “POCARI SWEAT” in large white letters with smaller text above saying “ION SUPPLY DRINK.” Add energetic frozen water splashes and droplets around the bottle, hand, and lower foreground to emphasize freshness and hydration. Place the brand logo in the upper left corner: “POCARI SWEAT” in white with the curved underline mark. Across the top, add huge distressed white Korean headline text, slightly angled and filling most of the upper half: {argument name="headline text" default="갈증 해소? 이걸로 끝! 포카리스웨트!"}. In the lower right over the suit, add a bold italic quotation in white and blue Korean text: {argument name="quote" default="WINNING은 수분 싸움! 포카리스웨트로 리프레시!"}. In the bottom left, include exactly 3 circular benefit icons stacked vertically with short Korean labels: a water drop icon with “수분 보충”, a lightning bolt icon with “전해질 보충”, and a running figure icon with “빠른 흡수”. Use a high-contrast, patriotic blue-and-white color palette, dramatic ad lighting, sharp focus on the bottle and hand, slightly softer focus on the face and background, and an overall energetic premium campaign-poster look.
translatedPrompt: 一张风格鲜明的韩式饮料广告海报，采用光泽感商业摄影风格。画面主体为 {argument name="spokesperson" default="唐纳德·特朗普替身"}，身穿深海军蓝商务西装，内搭白色衬衫，系着鲜艳的蓝色领带，正面对着镜头。背景是饱和度极高的亮蓝色天空，点缀着几朵柔和的白云，右侧隐约可见现代城市天际线，包括一座类似帝国大厦的高耸摩天大楼。他左手拿着一瓶冰镇塑料瓶装的 {argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"}，以夸张的透视效果伸向镜头，使瓶身在前景中显得格外巨大，人物则略微靠后。瓶身透明且带有冷凝水珠，配有白色瓶盖，瓶内可见液体，深蓝色标签上印有醒目的白色“POCARI SWEAT”字样，上方有较小的“ION SUPPLY DRINK”文字。在瓶身、手部及下方前景周围添加充满活力的冰冻水花和水滴，以强调清爽与补水感。品牌 Logo 放置在左上角：白色的“POCARI SWEAT”字样及下方的弧形下划线。海报顶部添加巨大的做旧风格白色韩文标题，略微倾斜并占据上半部分的大部分空间：{argument name="headline text" default="갈증 해소? 이걸로 끝! 포카리스웨트!"}。在右下方西装位置，添加一行醒目的斜体白色与蓝色韩文引用语：{argument name="quote" default="WINNING은 수분 싸움! 포카리스웨트로 리프레시!"}。左下角垂直排列 3 个圆形益处图标，并配有简短的韩文标签：水滴图标配“수분 보충”（水分补充）、闪电图标配“전해질 보충”（电解质补充）、奔跑人物图标配“빠른 흡수”（快速吸收）。采用高对比度的蓝白配色，运用戏剧性的广告布光，瓶身和手部焦点清晰，面部和背景焦点略微柔化，整体呈现出充满活力的优质广告海报质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 韩式运动饮料名人广告海报：此提示词用于生成一张炫目的韩式补水饮料海报，包含名人代言人、超大产品瓶身以及用于商业广告的醒目促销排版。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: front-facing, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
